name: /spec declines to emit tests when no standards source-folder grounds the feature description
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules: {}\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/spec.sh" "completely unknown feature with no precedent" --profile profiles/p.yaml --grounding-stub none 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'declined' err.txt && grep -q 'reason=no_grounding_standard_available' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
